---
name: Rule proposal
about: Propose a change to a VPM rule (requires a supporting case)
title: "[rule] "
labels: rule
assignees: ''
---

## Which rule?

Which of the five VPM rules are you proposing to change, add, or remove?

## The case that motivates this

No rule change is accepted without a supporting case. What project failure or success makes this change necessary?

If you have a full retrospective, link it or attach it.

## Proposed change

What exactly should the rule say? (Include the executable check if the rule changes.)

## What the current rule gets wrong

Why is the current formulation insufficient, incorrect, or missing an important failure mode?

## What breaks if you are wrong

If this change is adopted and it turns out to be wrong, what failure mode does it introduce or miss?
